title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Vistara

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Vistara
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Hotel Manager with drive and ambition, Vistara in Jodhpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Vistara:
Vistara is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vistara!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
